title: Stock Market Midday, July 22: Markets Brace for Alphabet Earnings as Hyperscaler's AI Debt Comes Into Focus
excerpt: Today, July 22, 2026, WTI crude oil jumped above $86 per barrel on Middle East tensions, sparking inflation fears.
content_html:
As of 11:31 AM ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES:^DJI) is up 0.24% to 52,351.14, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX:^GSPC) has gained 0.07% to 7,514.29, and the Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX:^IXIC) has slipped 0.15% to 25,798.97 as tech stocks come under pressure.

Gold prices have climbed 1.98% to $4,154.42 as of 11:39 AM ET, while the 10-Year Treasury yield is trading up 0.02% at 4.65%. Utilities and energy stocks are leading sector gains, while technology and communication services are falling.

Today's biggest moves

The Magnificent Seven are in focus this morning, with quarterly results due from Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) (NASDAQ:GOOG) and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) after the bell. Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), and Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) all dropped in early trading. Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCIP) soared over 24% after the company said it expects its 2026 gross margins to double.

What this means for investors

It has been a mixed morning of trading as oil prices continued to increase, fueling renewed inflation concerns and pressuring global markets. WTI crude rose over 2% to more than $86 a barrel. Traders are concerned about further supply restrictions as tensions in the Middle East show no signs of de-escalation.

A research note from Goldman Sachs Group highlighted the eye watering level of debt issuance to fund artificial intelligence (AI) build-outs. It said around $489 billion in AI-related debt had been issued this year, with hyperscalers such as Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta accounting for 40% of the debt. As markets brace for Alphabet and Tesla earnings later today, investors will be looking for signs that this intensive spending is driving revenue growth.

Should you buy stock in S&P 500 Index right now?

Before you buy stock in S&P 500 Index, consider this:

The Motley Fool Stock Advisor analyst team just identified what they believe are the 10 best stocks for investors to buy now… and S&P 500 Index wasn't one of them. The 10 stocks that made the cut are built for long-term growth and could produce monster returns in the coming years.

Consider when Netflix made this list on December 17, 2004... if you invested $1,000 at the time of our recommendation, you'd have $370,332!* Or when Nvidia made this list on April 15, 2005... if you invested $1,000 at the time of our recommendation, you'd have $1,272,280!*

That performance is why people listen. With a track record of beating the S&P 500 by 4x, Stock Advisor offers a distinct advantage. Don't miss the latest top 10 list, available with Stock Advisor, and join an investing community built for the long haul.

content_html_zh:
截至美国东部时间上午 11:31，道琼斯工业平均指数 (DJINDICES:^DJI) 上涨 0.24%，至 52,351.14，标准普尔 500 指数 (SNPINDEX:^GSPC) 上涨 0.07%，至 7,514.29，纳斯达克综合指数 (NASDAQINDEX:^IXIC) 下跌 0.15%，至25,798.97，科技股承压。

截至美国东部时间上午 11:39，金价上涨 1.98% 至 4,154.42 美元，而 10 年期国债收益率上涨 0.02% 至 4.65%。 公用事业和能源股领涨板块，而技术和通信服务股则下跌。

今日最大动作

今天早上，“七巨头”成为焦点，Alphabet（纳斯达克股票代码：GOOGL）（纳斯达克股票代码：GOOG）和特斯拉（纳斯达克股票代码：TSLA）在盘后公布了季度业绩。 微软（纳斯达克股票代码：MSFT）、亚马逊（纳斯达克股票代码：AMZN）和Meta Platform（纳斯达克股票代码：META）早盘均下跌。 Super Micro Computer（纳斯达克股票代码：SMCIP）表示预计 2026 年毛利率将翻一番，股价飙升超过 24%。

这对投资者意味着什么

由于油价持续上涨，加剧了新的通胀担忧，给全球市场带来压力，今天早上的交易好坏参半。 WTI 原油上涨超过 2%，至每桶 86 美元以上。 由于中东紧张局势没有缓和的迹象，交易商对进一步的供应限制感到担忧。

高盛集团的一份研究报告强调了为人工智能（AI）建设提供资金的债务发行水平令人瞠目结舌。 据称，今年已发行了约 4890 亿美元的人工智能相关债务，其中微软、亚马逊和 Meta 等超大规模企业占债务的 40%。 随着今天晚些时候市场为 Alphabet 和特斯拉的财报做好准备，投资者将寻找这种密集支出正在推动收入增长的迹象。

您现在应该购买标准普尔 500 指数的股票吗？

在购买 S&P 500 指数股票之前，请考虑以下因素：

Motley Fool Stock Advisor 分析师团队刚刚确定了他们认为最适合投资者购买的 10 只股票…… 标准普尔 500 指数并不是其中之一。 入选的 10 只股票是为长期增长而打造的，可能会在未来几年产生巨额回报。

考虑一下 Netflix 在 2004 年 12 月 17 日列出此列表时的情况…… 如果您在我们推荐时投资了 1,000 美元，您将获得 370,332 美元！*或者当 Nvidia 于 2005 年 4 月 15 日列出此列表时...... 如果您在我们推荐时投资了 1,000 美元，您将获得 1,272,280 美元！*

那场表演就是人们倾听的原因。 Stock Advisor 拥有击败标准普尔 500 指数 4 倍的记录，具有明显的优势。 不要错过股票顾问提供的最新前 10 名名单，并加入为长期投资而建立的社区。
